attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.TASK_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.PROJECT_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.TASK_NUMBER, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.CREATION_DATE, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.CREATED_BY, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.TASK_NAME USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR),
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.TOP_TASK_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.WBS_LEVEL, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.READY_TO_BILL_FLAG, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.READY_TO_DISTRIBUTE_FLAG, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.PARENT_TASK_ID, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.DESCRIPTION USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR),
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.CARRYING_OUT_ORGANIZATION_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.SERVICE_TYPE_CODE, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.TASK_MANAGER_PERSON_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.CHARGEABLE_FLAG, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.BILLABLE_FLAG, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.LIMIT_TO_TXN_CONTROLS_FLAG, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.START_DATE, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.COMPLETION_DATE, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.ADDRESS_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.LABOR_BILL_RATE_ORG_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.LABOR_STD_BILL_RATE_SCHDL, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.LABOR_SCHEDULE_FIXED_DATE, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.LABOR_SCHEDULE_DISCOUNT, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.NON_LABOR_BILL_RATE_ORG_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.NON_LABOR_STD_BILL_RATE_SCHDL, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.NON_LABOR_SCHEDULE_FIXED_DATE, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.NON_LABOR_SCHEDULE_DISCOUNT, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.LABOR_COST_MULTIPLIER_NAME, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.REQUEST_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.PROGRAM_ID, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.ATTRIBUTE1, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.ATTRIBUTE2, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.ATTRIBUTE3, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.ATTRIBUTE4, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.ATTRIBUTE5, 
STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.ATTRIBUTE6,
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.ATTRIBUTE7, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.ATTRIBUTE8 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR),
 TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.ATTRIBUTE9 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.ATTRIBUTE10, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.COST_IND_RATE_SCH_ID, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.REV_IND_RATE_SCH_ID,
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.INV_IND_RATE_SCH_ID, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.COST_IND_SCH_FIXED_DATE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.REV_IND_SCH_FIXED_DATE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.INV_IND_SCH_FIXED_DATE,
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.LABOR_SCH_TYPE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.NON_LABOR_SCH_TYPE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.OVR_COST_IND_RATE_SCH_ID, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.OVR_INV_IND_RATE_SCH_ID,
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.OVR_REV_IND_RATE_SCH_ID, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.PM_PRODUCT_CODE, 
 TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.PM_TASK_REFERENCE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR),
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.ACTUAL_START_DATE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.ACTUAL_FINISH_DATE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.EARLY_START_DATE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.EARLY_FINISH_DATE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.LATE_START_DATE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.LATE_FINISH_DATE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.SCHEDULED_START_DATE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.SCHEDULED_FINISH_DATE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.ADW_NOTIFY_FLAG, 
 TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.ALLOW_CROSS_CHARGE_FLAG USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.PROJECT_RATE_DATE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.PROJECT_RATE_TYPE,
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.CC_PROCESS_LABOR_FLAG, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.LABOR_TP_SCHEDULE_ID, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.LABOR_TP_FIXED_DATE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.CC_PROCESS_NL_FLAG, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.NL_TP_SCHEDULE_ID, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.NL_TP_FIXED_DATE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.RECEIVE_PROJECT_INVOICE_FLAG, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.WORK_TYPE_ID, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.RECORD_VERSION_NUMBER, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.JOB_BILL_RATE_SCHEDULE_ID,
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.EMP_BILL_RATE_SCHEDULE_ID, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.TASKFUNC_COST_RATE_TYPE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.TASKFUNC_COST_RATE_DATE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.NON_LAB_STD_BILL_RT_SCH_ID, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.LABOR_DISC_REASON_CODE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.NON_LABOR_DISC_REASON_CODE, 
 TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.LONG_TASK_NAME USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR),
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.RETIREMENT_COST_FLAG, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.CINT_ELIGIBLE_FLAG, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.CINT_STOP_DATE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.REVENUE_ACCRUAL_METHOD, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.INVOICE_METHOD,
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.CUSTOMER_ID, 
 TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.GEN_ETC_SOURCE_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR), 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.BILL_SCHE_OVRD_FLAG, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.ADJ_ON_STD_INV,
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.IC_LABOR_TP_SCHEDULE_ID, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.IC_LABOR_TP_FIXED_DATE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.IC_NL_TP_SCHEDULE_ID, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.IC_NL_TP_FIXED_DATE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, 
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
 STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_TASKS STG_CSF_PA_TASKS,
  (
 select TASK_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_TASKS
 minus
 select TASK_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_TASKS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.TASK_ID = STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.TASK_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_TASKS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_TASKS)
